race.comment: SUNSET SESSION (1) went under narrowly in a stronger race first-up before a 0.9L defeat in Maiden grade most recently on a Heavy deck. CJP reunites with the gelding now and third-up into the campaign, he makes plenty of appeal. Looks ready to shed the maiden tag. PANCHO'S PLACE (3) gets the blinkers on for the first time as he returns to the Mack Hall stable, with his recent trial being very impressive. The inside draw should see him thereabouts in the run and with a touch of luck on straightening, he'll be good enough to make his presence felt. MOONS ECHO (12) is a 2YO on debut who has impressed at the trials coming in. She carries no weight here and the draw should see her get every chance. Can make an impression. OSCARS NO GROUCH (2) is hard to knock on recent form and comes right back in grade today. Major player. BUBBLES IN RIO (5) can go one better with the fresh run under her belt.
